caption: The video appears to be a news segment from an Indian news channel, specifically News18 India, as indicated by the logo and branding on the screen. The main focus is on a man speaking into a microphone with the ANI (Asian News International) logo, suggesting he is being interviewed or giving a statement. The background shows a gathering of people, possibly at an event or press conference. The text on the screen is in Hindi, discussing political topics related to the Congress party and Tejashwi Yadav's "picture" issue. The ticker at the bottom provides additional news updates, and there are advertisements for Mahakosh mustard oil at the bottom of the screen. The overall setting suggests a live or recorded news broadcast covering current political events.
